insight_events.title: Growth regime strengthening
insight_events.summary: Growth regime strengthening: YoY growth moved to -34.5% to +69.0% YoY (baseline median -2.1% YoY) in the latest quarter. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.
insight_events.why_it_matters: Positive evidence. May change earnings power, cash generation, or the valuation range.
insight_events.recommended_follow_up: Compare this development with the thesis, falsifiers, and valuation assumptions.

insight_events.title: Nvidia's Stock Hasn't Been This Cheap Since 2019. Here's Why It's the Best Buy in the Market Now.
insight_events.summary: Nvidia's stock has underperformed the S&P 500 in 2026 despite strong business results, causing its valuation to reach its lowest point since 2019 at a P/E ratio of 31. The article argues this makes Nvidia an attractive buy given Wall Street expects 82% revenue growth this fiscal year and 42% next year, with the AI inf...
insight_events.why_it_matters: May alter the timing or probability of a near-term catalyst.
insight_events.recommended_follow_up: Open the primary evidence, validate the ticker match, and record any thesis disagreement.

latest.title: Nvidia's Stock Hasn't Been This Cheap Since 2019. Here's Why It's the Best Buy in the Market Now.
latest.summary: Nvidia's stock has underperformed the S&P 500 in 2026 despite strong business results, causing its valuation to reach its lowest point since 2019 at a P/E ratio of 31. The article argues this makes Nvidia an attractive buy given Wall Street expects 82% revenue growth this fiscal year and 42% next year, with the AI inf.
